goal: Review and harden the model design and training design end to end, with priority on de novo full molecular flow, shape-safe training objectives, leakage-control semantics, slot specialization, controlled cross-modal interaction, trainer/runtime correctness, and claim-safe evaluation evidence.
context_summary: The current Rust stack already exposes separate topology, geometry, and pocket/context encoders; learned slot decomposition; six directed gated cross-modal attention paths; conditioned denoising; geometry flow matching; and a config-gated de_novo_initialization path with molecular flow branches. The main risks are not missing scaffolding but weak or ambiguous training semantics: de novo auxiliary losses still assume target atom count compatibility in some paths, leakage penalties can train probes to fail instead of proving non-leakage, de novo target alignment is index-based rather than permutation-invariant, pocket_context flow reconstruction is not a strong ligand-pocket generation signal, slot semantics are weakly tied to the primary task, and trainer/evaluation metrics can overemphasize health checks or processed layers.
primary_risks: De novo auxiliary probe and consistency losses may panic or silently mis-supervise when generated atom count differs from target ligand atom count.
Explicit leakage training currently mixes probe and encoder roles, so low leakage loss can mean a weak or sabotaged probe rather than low semantic leakage.
Full molecular flow de novo training aligns generated and target atoms by index, which is not permutation-invariant and can teach unstable atom ordering artifacts.
The pocket_context flow branch reconstructs conditioning context instead of directly constraining ligand-pocket contacts, interactions, or compatibility.
Slot decomposition is present but weakly coupled to task-critical atom, bond, geometry, and pocket decisions.
Cross-modal gates are path-level scalars, which is controllable but too coarse for local pocket-conditioned generation.
Rollout diagnostics are not consistently isolated from optimizer-facing training graphs in batched paths.
Default validation and gradient diagnostics can report training health without proving model quality or objective-family gradient behavior.
Config names such as enabled flow branches, branch schedules, and claim switches can be misunderstood by future experiments.
non_goals: Do not collapse topology, geometry, and pocket/context encoders into a single unrestricted fusion encoder.
Do not replace directed gated cross-modal interaction with naive fusion except as an explicit negative-control ablation.
Do not rewrite core modeling, training, data loading, or evaluation logic into Python.
Do not promote smoke-test de novo execution into benchmark-quality molecular-generation claims.
Do not hide coordinate repair, valence pruning, reranking, or backend scoring inside raw model-native metrics.
Do not make unstable mutual-information estimators the central redundancy objective.
execution_rules: Complete phases in order unless a later task is required to unblock an earlier one.
Delete a task object from todo.json only after its acceptance_criteria, verification, and completion_evidence are satisfied.
Do not delete a phase until every task in that phase has been completed and removed.
If a task is blocked, keep it in todo.json and add blocker_note with the concrete blocker and proposed next step.
After deleting tasks, update task_count_expected and phase_count so they match remaining tasks and phases.
Keep the crate compiling after each implementation phase.
Prefer Rust implementation and tests for core model, loss, trainer, data, and evaluation work.
Preserve separate modality encoders, explicit slot decomposition, directed gated cross-modal interaction, and ablation-friendly config surfaces.
Use targeted tests for touched modules first, then broader verification before removing phase-critical tasks.
Avoid reverting unrelated dirty worktree changes.
When context becomes large, update current_state_summary with completed phase outcomes before continuing.

workflow.execution_order: P0 baseline audit, P1 de novo shape-safe losses, P2 leakage-control redesign, P3 permutation-invariant full-flow matching, P4 pocket-conditioned molecular-flow semantics, P5 slot and interaction strengthening, P6 trainer/runtime cleanup, P7 data and coordinate contracts, P8 evaluation and claim safety, P9 documentation and final validation.
workflow.task_retention: Never delete a task until concrete completion evidence exists in the working context.
workflow.task_count_policy: task_count_expected must equal the total number of remaining task objects across all phases.
workflow.phase_count_policy: phase_count must equal the number of phases that still contain task objects.

task_metadata_schema.id: Stable task id. Remove the entire task object only after completion.
task_metadata_schema.title: Short task name.
task_metadata_schema.task_type: audit | contract | design | implementation | validation | documentation | configuration
task_metadata_schema.depends_on: List of task ids that should be completed first.
task_metadata_schema.problem: Concrete issue the task protects against.
task_metadata_schema.action: Implementation, audit, validation, or documentation work to perform.
task_metadata_schema.acceptance_criteria: Checks required before deleting the task.
task_metadata_schema.completion_evidence: Concrete evidence required before removing the task from todo.json.

current_state_summary: Q14 hardening plan completed on 2026-04-29. P0-P8 delivered shape-safe de novo losses, frozen leakage audit separation, permutation-invariant target matching, pocket interaction flow semantics, slot-local conditioning, controlled interaction diagnostics, trainer/runtime hardening, data/coordinate contracts, raw-native claim evidence, repair-case audits, and compact conditioned_denoising, geometry_flow, and de_novo_full_flow smokes in checkpoints/q14_final_smoke. Q14 final smoke results: validation/test finite-forward fraction 1.0 for all three surfaces, total nonfinite gradient tensors 0, and de_novo_full_flow records hungarian_distance non-index matching with target_matching_claim_safe=true plus leakage calibration status. P9 updated final documentation in architecture_module_map, q14_active_path_review, generation_objective_boundary, q14_leakage_training_contract, claim_readiness, dataset_training_methods_zh, q14_final_smoke_summary, and q14_final_documentation_summary; generated Chinese HTML/DOCX/ODT formats were refreshed with pandoc. Final verification passed: jq empty todo.json and Q14 JSON artifacts, cargo fmt --check, git diff --check, cargo test --no-run, cargo test --no-fail-fast, tools/local_ci.sh fast, cargo test evaluation, cargo test experiments, cargo test reviewer_tooling, cargo test --test reviewer_tooling, and stale-doc wording rg checks. todo.json is complete with phases=[], task_count_expected=0, and phase_count=0.
